---
title: "Publications & Presentations"
---

## Conference Presentations

### 2026
*   **Santos, H.**, & Menendez, D. (2026). *Children’s Multiple Conceptions of Death: Biological, Spiritual, and Affective Understandings.* 
Poster presented at the Cognitive Development Society (CDS) Conference, Montreal, Canada.
<a href="files/H_Santos-CDS_Poster_2026.pdf" class="btn btn-outline-primary" style="padding: 1px 6px; font-size: 0.75rem; line-height: 1.2; vertical-align: middle; margin-left: 8px;"><i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> Poster PDF</a>

### 2025
*   **Santos, H.**, & Menendez, D. (2025). *Once Upon a Goodbye: Exploring How Animated Films Spark Child-Caregiver Conversations About Death.* 
Poster presented at the Cognitive Science Society (CogSci) Conference, San Francisco, United States.
*   **Santos, H.**, & Menendez, D. (2025). *Once Upon a Goodbye: Exploring How Animated Films Spark Parent-Child Conversations About Death.* 
Presentation at the Bay Area Developmental Symposium, UC Merced, United States.

---

## Manuscripts in Preparation

*   **Santos, H.**, & Menendez, D. (In Prep). *Children's Understanding of Death and Parent-Child Conversations About Death.*

---
